falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes below 4950 on any daily session in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break below the August 2024 swing low equivalent invalidates the bottom pattern match; the 79% similarity to bottom_2024_aug requires holding above that structural support, and failure here confirms continuation lower not basing

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The blowoff score of 40 implies moderate fear not panic; sustained VIX above 35 indicates genuine systemic stress rather than the controlled capitulation the pattern requires, breaking the bottoming structure

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops more than 40bps from current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A rapid flight-to-quality bid of this magnitude signals recession/deleveraging panic, not the orderly rate-stabilization bottom; the August 2024 bottom formed with yields consolidating, not collapsing

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
